meta.subject: Social Studies
meta.source: NCDC Primary Seven Curriculum Set One, Social Studies Syllabus, Theme: Living Together in Africa
meta.notes: Mapped from the official NCDC P7 Set One Social Studies topic outline. P7 SST has one broad theme, Living Together in Africa, with 10 topics across three terms.

topics.title: Location of Africa on the Map of the World
subTopics: Location and position of Africa using lines of latitudes and longitudes
World continents and their sizes
Water bodies that surround Africa
Regions that make up Africa
Countries in each region and their capital cities

topics.title: Physical Features of Africa
subTopics: Names and location of physical features in Africa
Mountains and highlands
Rivers
Lakes
Plateau
Rift valley
Coastal plains
Formation of major physical features of Africa

topics.title: Climate of Africa
subTopics: Climatic regions of Africa
Characteristics of different climatic regions
Factors that influence climate of Africa
Influence of climate on human activities
Influence of human activities on climate

topics.title: Vegetation of Africa
subTopics: Location and names of vegetation types of Africa
Factors that influence vegetation distribution in Africa
Importance of vegetation to people and animals
Importance of game parks
Animals found in different vegetation zones
Reasons why animals live in different vegetation zones
Population distribution in relation to vegetation
Reasons for differences in population distribution in different vegetation zones
Effects of population on vegetation

topics.title: The People of Africa, the Ethnic Groups and Settlement Patterns
subTopics: Origin of different ethnic groups
Movements of different ethnic groups into Africa
Settlement patterns of different ethnic groups
Tribes belonging to different ethnic groups
Reasons for migration and settlement of ethnic groups in Africa
Problems met by ethnic groups during movement and settlement in Africa
Effects of ethnic migrations

topics.title: Foreign Influence in Africa
subTopics: Foreign groups in Africa
Reasons for the coming of European explorers into Africa
Problems faced by European explorers in Africa
Effects of European explorers
European traders in Africa and Triangular trade
Reasons for the coming of traders into Africa
European colonialists in Africa
Scramble and partition of Africa
Establishment of colonial rule in Africa
Methods of acquiring colonies
European settlers in South Africa and Zimbabwe
Great Trek in South Africa
Effects of foreign influence
Methods used by colonialists to administer colonies

topics.title: Nationalism and the Road to Independence of Africa
subTopics: Meaning of Pan-Africanism, Pan-Africanists, nationalism, nationalists and patriotism
Work of Pan-Africanists and nationalists
Countries that were not colonised in Africa
Reasons for maintaining independence
Leading Pan-Africanists who fought for Africa's independence
Methods of work by Pan-Africanists and nationalists
Problems Pan-Africanists and nationalists faced
Multiparty system
Single party system

topics.title: Post-Independence Africa
subTopics: Formation of OAU
Objectives, functions, achievements and failures of OAU
Formation and objectives of AU
Challenges and organs of AU
Regional economic groupings including COMESA, ECOWAS, SADC and IGAD
Advantages and disadvantages of economic cooperation
Ways of solving problems faced by economic groupings

topics.title: Economic Developments in Africa
subTopics: Major economic resources of Africa
Problems faced in the utilisation of resources
Caring for our resources
Major economic development in Africa
Case studies: Nigeria, Sudan, Libya, South Africa, DRC and Uganda
Comparison with other countries in terms of economic development
Challenges affecting economic development in Africa
Possible solutions to problems that affect economic development in Africa

topics.title: Major World Organisations
subTopics: Formation of the United Nations
Origin, objectives, membership, organs and functions of the UN
UN agencies and their functions
Importance of the United Nations
UN Human Rights Charter
The Commonwealth of Nations
Membership and functions of the Commonwealth
Challenges of the UN and the Commonwealth of Nations
